LanguageData.VFE_IdeoFloatMenuPlus.description: This optional feature extends the menus in the Ideo creation screen, allowing search and scroll bars. Used by VE Memes and Alpha Memes.
LanguageData.VFE_TileMutatorMechanics.description: This optional feature adds a Def extension, TileMutatorExtension, to add new tile mutator mechanics for Odyssey.
LanguageData.VFE_WeaponTraitDefMechanics.description: This optional feature adds a Def extension to WeaponTraitDefs to allow for new unique weapon behaviours.
